note: Fictional off-site evidence ledger for the public showcase (v2.6). Facts only, never scores. Every outlet, roundup, profile, date, and quote is invented; URLs are illustrative and do not resolve. Competitors named are real public companies used only as market context.

facts.title: Northwind Pay raises $48M to scale stablecoin payouts
facts.entity_binding_note: Correctly bound to the regulated stablecoin payments company.

facts.title: Northwind Pay extends stablecoin payout infrastructure
Term Sheet: the week in fintech raises
facts.entity_binding_note: One-line mention in a roundup of raises.

press_earned_media.summary_note: Coverage is milestone press tied to the Series B. No original category reporting since, and Northwind is not quoted as a source in stablecoin-payments stories. Absent from CNN/NYT/WSJ.

facts.title: Top stablecoin payment infrastructure providers
facts.framing_note: Leads with Circle, Bridge, Sphere, Fireblocks, Brale. Northwind absent.

facts.title: Stablecoin payment providers in 2026
facts.framing_note: Names Circle, Bridge, Zero Hash, Crossmint, Brale. Northwind absent.

facts.title: 2026 guide to the most reliable stablecoin payments providers
facts.framing_note: Custody-leaning list; Fireblocks, Circle, Zero Hash. Northwind absent.

facts.title: Top stablecoin infrastructure platforms
facts.framing_note: Broad list; still no Northwind entry.

facts.title: Stablecoin payment APIs compared
facts.framing_note: Vendor-authored comparison; Northwind not among the eight.

category_pub_mentions.summary_note: Northwind is absent from every checked category publication, including all four the measured AI answers cited. This is the single clearest discoverability signal.

review_sites.summary_note: No usable footprint across the resolved set. No B2B review profiles (all 404) and no crypto-desk coverage. Bridge and Fireblocks carry populated G2 categories.

facts.title: What companies provide stablecoin payment APIs?
facts.note: Lists Bridge, Sphere, Circle. Northwind not mentioned.

reddit.summary_note: No naming threads for Northwind in r/fintech, r/cryptocurrency, or r/stablecoins. No negative narrative, just absence.

facts.title: Stablecoin payouts with Dana Whitfield
facts.guest_intro_binding_note: Intro correctly frames Northwind as a regulated payouts API.

podcasts.summary_note: One regional fintech-payments episode plus a panel writeup. No marquee or generalist shows, no transcripts.

facts.title: Send a stablecoin payout in 60 seconds

youtube.summary_note: Owned channel with a handful of demo videos and transcripts on. No third-party coverage.

facts.note: Substantive weekly posts on payout infrastructure; modest reach.

executive_social.summary_note: Real founder substance on LinkedIn, modest audience; little long-form thought leadership.

facts.descriptor_verbatim: Regulated stablecoin payment infrastructure for PSPs and fintechs.

facts.mismatch_note: Stale descriptor, off the regulated-infrastructure positioning.

directory_consistency.summary_note: Crunchbase and PitchBook current and consistent; the LinkedIn descriptor lags the positioning.

facts.accuracy_note: No article. The Northwind term resolves to the Microsoft sample database, a mild disambiguation risk.

wikipedia_wikidata.summary_note: Empty encyclopedic slot. Notability likely thin at Series B, so this is a ceiling rather than a quick fix.

facts.collision_severity_note: Well-known namesake, but a different category; the disambiguator 'Northwind Pay' separates cleanly and the audit observed zero wrong-entity answers.

name_binding.summary_note: Namesake pressure exists but is low-severity; binding holds in practice.
